title: Expropriation by public entity; authority
doc_html:
§16.  Expropriation by public entity; authority

Nothing in this Part shall alter or amend the authority of or the procedure for the state or its political corporations or subdivisions to expropriate property as otherwise provided by law.

Acts 2012, No. 702, §1.
